description_long: This object is a single, mature mushroom with a thick, cylindrical stem and a broad, rounded cap. The cap is brown with a mottled, scaly pattern of lighter and darker patches, giving it a textured appearance. The stem is off-white to light tan, robust, and slightly bulbous at the base, with subtle vertical striations and some surface irregularities. The underside of the cap is not visible, so the presence of gills cannot be confirmed from these views. The mushroom appears fresh, with a firm, fleshy structure typical of edible varieties found in temperate environments. There is no visible substrate or environmental context, as the background is plain and featureless.
description: A thick-stemmed, brown-capped mushroom with a mottled, scaly surface and a robust, off-white stem.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, rounded cap with mottled brown and white pattern and a straight, thick stem.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the cap's dome shape and the stem's slight curvature and surface texture.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the cap's overhang and the stem's bulbous base with some dark discoloration.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the cap's curvature and the stem's vertical striations and irregularities.
